creator: giovanni.nava@gmail.com
text:
I have a fujitsu-siemens Amilo 7440 model. There is an hardware switch
for wlan.  When i had fedora 5 distribution installed in, i use fsam7440
module (http://fsam7440.sourceforge.net/index2.html) to turn on my wireless
card. with freebsd there is a compile problem: on the header of the main
file there is a library, io.h, that freebsd doesn't have. is there any
emulator or ports to install to have that library?

perhapes is a stupid problem, sorry but i'm a newbie.

Giovanni Nava
